sentences.sentence: Japan has a significantly better record in terms of average mathematical attainment than England and Wales.
sentences.translation: 就平均数学成绩而言，日本的表现明显优于英格兰和威尔士。

structure.text: in terms of average mathematical attainment

difficult_points: in terms of 表示“就……而言”，限定比较的方面。
better 后接 than 构成比较级结构。

sentences.sentence: Large sample international comparisons of pupils' attainments since the 1960s have established that not only did Japanese pupils at age 13 have better scores of average attainment, but there was also a larger proportion of 'low' attainers in England, where, incidentally, the variation in attainment scores was much greater.
sentences.translation: 自20世纪60年代以来，大样本国际比较已经证实：13岁的日本学生不仅平均成绩更高，而且英格兰“低成绩”学生的比例也更大；顺带一提，那里学生成绩的差异也大得多。

structure.text: Large sample international comparisons of pupils' attainments since the 1960s
that not only did Japanese pupils at age 13 have better scores of average attainment, but there was also a larger proportion of 'low' attainers in England
where, incidentally, the variation in attainment scores was much greater

difficult_points: not only 置于从句开头时触发 did Japanese pupils have 的部分倒装。
where 指 England；incidentally 是插入副词，意为“顺带说一下”。

sentences.sentence: The percentage of Gross National Product spent on education is reasonably similar in the two countries, so how is this higher and more consistent attainment in maths achieved?
sentences.translation: 两国用于教育的国民生产总值比例相当接近，那么这种更高且更稳定的数学成绩是如何取得的呢？

structure.text: The percentage of Gross National Product spent on education
how is this higher and more consistent attainment in maths achieved

difficult_points: spent on education 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 Gross National Product。
how 开头的疑问句使用被动语态，询问这种成绩“如何被实现”。

sentences.sentence: Lower secondary schools in Japan cover three school years, from the seventh grade (age 13) to the ninth grade (age 15).
sentences.translation: 日本的初中阶段涵盖三个学年，从七年级（13岁）到九年级（15岁）。

structure.text: from the seventh grade (age 13) to the ninth grade (age 15)

difficult_points: cover 表示“涵盖”，不是“覆盖物”。
from...to... 给出三个学年的起止范围。

sentences.sentence: Virtually all pupils at this stage attend state schools: only 3 per cent are in the private sector.
sentences.translation: 这一阶段几乎所有学生都上公立学校：只有3%在私立学校就读。

structure.text: Virtually all pupils at this stage
only 3 per cent are in the private sector

difficult_points: virtually 表示“几乎”，不是“虚拟地”。
冒号后的分句用具体比例解释前面的概括。

sentences.sentence: Schools are usually modern in design, set well back from the road and spacious inside.
sentences.translation: 学校的设计通常很现代化，离道路较远，内部空间宽敞。

structure.text: set well back from the road

difficult_points: set well back... 是过去分词短语，说明学校与道路的相对位置。
spacious inside 中 inside 作副词，说明内部很宽敞。

sentences.sentence: Classrooms are large and pupils sit at single desks in rows.
sentences.translation: 教室很大，学生一人一桌，成排就坐。

structure.text: pupils sit at single desks in rows

difficult_points: and 连接两个完整分句，分别描述教室和学生座位。
at single desks 表示“坐在单人课桌前”，in rows 表示按排。

sentences.sentence: Lessons last for a standardised 50 minutes and are always followed by a 10-minute break, which gives the pupils a chance to let off steam.
sentences.translation: 每节课统一为50分钟，之后总有10分钟休息，这让学生有机会释放精力。

structure.text: are always followed by a 10-minute break
which gives the pupils a chance to let off steam

difficult_points: are followed by 是被动结构，表示课后接着是休息。
which 指前面的 10-minute break；let off steam 是习语。

sentences.sentence: Teachers begin with a formal address and mutual bowing, and then concentrate on whole-class teaching.
sentences.translation: 教师以正式致辞和相互鞠躬开始，然后专注于全班教学。

structure.text: a formal address and mutual bowing

difficult_points: begin with 表示“以……开始”。
and then 连接同一主语的两个谓语动作。

sentences.sentence: Classes are large - usually about 40 - and are unstreamed.
sentences.translation: 班级规模很大——通常约40人——而且不按能力分班。
difficult_points: 破折号中的 usually about 40 是插入说明班级人数。
unstreamed 指不按能力分流或分层。

sentences.sentence: Pupils stay in the same class for all lessons throughout the school and develop considerable class identity and loyalty.
sentences.translation: 学生在整个就学期间所有课程都留在同一个班，并形成很强的班级认同感和忠诚感。

structure.text: for all lessons throughout the school
develop considerable class identity and loyalty

difficult_points: throughout the school 表示贯穿整个在校时期。
develop 与 stay 并列，共用 Pupils 作主语。

sentences.sentence: Pupils attend the school in their own neighbourhood, which in theory removes ranking by school.
sentences.translation: 学生就读于自己所在社区的学校，理论上这消除了按学校排名的情况。

structure.text: the school in their own neighbourhood
which in theory removes ranking by school

difficult_points: which 指整件“按社区就近入学”的安排，而非 neighbourhood。
in theory 表示“理论上”，暗示实际可能不同。

sentences.sentence: In practice in Tokyo, because of the relative concentration of schools, there is some competition to get into the 'better' school in a particular area.
sentences.translation: 但在东京的实际情况中，由于学校相对集中，人们仍会竞争进入某一地区“更好”的学校。

structure.text: because of the relative concentration of schools
to get into the 'better' school in a particular area

difficult_points: because of 后接名词短语说明原因。
to get into... 后置修饰 competition，说明竞争的目标。

sentences.sentence: Traditional ways of teaching form the basis of the lesson and the remarkably quiet classes take their own notes of the points made and the examples demonstrated.
sentences.translation: 传统教学方式构成课程基础，而异常安静的班级会自行记录所讲的要点和演示的例子。

structure.text: the remarkably quiet classes take their own notes of the points made and the examples demonstrated

difficult_points: the points made 和 the examples demonstrated 中的过去分词分别修饰 points 和 examples。
take notes of 表示“记录……”，不是“带走笔记”。

sentences.sentence: Everyone has their own copy of the textbook supplied by the central education authority, Monbusho, as part of the concept of free compulsory education up to the age of 15.
sentences.translation: 每个人都有一本由中央教育主管部门文部省提供的教材，这是15岁以前免费义务教育理念的一部分。

structure.text: their own copy of the textbook
supplied by the central education authority, Monbusho
as part of the concept of free compulsory education up to the age of 15

difficult_points: supplied... 是过去分词短语，修饰 textbook；Monbusho 是 authority 的同位语。
as part of 表示“作为……的一部分”。

sentences.sentence: These textbooks are, on the whole, small, presumably inexpensive to produce, but well set out and logically developed.
sentences.translation: 总体而言，这些教材篇幅不大，推想制作成本低，但编排得很好、逻辑发展清晰。

structure.text: well set out and logically developed

difficult_points: on the whole 和 presumably 都是插入性状语，分别表示“总体上”和推测。
inexpensive to produce 中不定式说明在哪方面成本低。

sentences.sentence: (One teacher was particularly keen to introduce colour and pictures into maths textbooks: he felt this would make them more accessible to pupils brought up in a cartoon culture.)
sentences.translation: （一位教师特别希望在数学教材中加入颜色和图片：他认为这会让在漫画文化中成长的学生更容易接受教材。）

structure.text: to introduce colour and pictures into maths textbooks
he felt this would make them more accessible to pupils brought up in a cartoon culture

difficult_points: be keen to do 表示“很想做……”。
this 指加入颜色和图片；them 指 maths textbooks，brought up... 修饰 pupils。

sentences.sentence: Besides approving textbooks, Monbusho also decides the highly centralised national curriculum and how it is to be delivered.
sentences.translation: 除了批准教材外，文部省还决定高度集中的国家课程以及课程应如何实施。

structure.text: how it is to be delivered

difficult_points: Besides 后接动名词 approving，表示“除……之外”。
how 从句与 curriculum 并列作 decides 的宾语；it 指 curriculum。

sentences.sentence: Lessons all follow the same pattern.
sentences.translation: 所有课程都遵循同一种模式。
difficult_points: all 放在主语后、谓语前，强调所有课程无一例外。
follow the same pattern 表示遵循相同流程。

sentences.sentence: At the beginning, the pupils put solutions to the homework on the board, then the teachers comment, correct or elaborate as necessary.
sentences.translation: 开始时，学生把作业答案写到黑板上，随后教师视需要进行评论、纠正或阐释。

structure.text: the teachers comment, correct or elaborate as necessary

difficult_points: solutions to the homework 表示“作业的答案”。
comment、correct、elaborate 三个动词并列，as necessary 表示“视需要而定”。

sentences.sentence: Pupils mark their own homework: this is an important principle in Japanese schooling as it enables pupils to see where and why they made a mistake, so that these can be avoided in future.
sentences.translation: 学生自己批改作业：这是日本教育中的一项重要原则，因为它使学生看清自己在哪儿、为什么犯错，从而以后能够避免这些错误。

structure.text: this is an important principle in Japanese schooling
as it enables pupils to see where and why they made a mistake
so that these can be avoided in future

difficult_points: this 指学生自己批改作业这一做法；as 引导原因。
where and why 引导并列的间接疑问；these 指 mistakes。

sentences.sentence: No one minds mistakes or ignorance as long as you are prepared to learn from them.
sentences.translation: 只要你愿意从中学习，没人会介意错误或无知。

structure.text: as long as you are prepared to learn from them

difficult_points: as long as 引导条件状语从句，表示“只要”。
them 指 mistakes or ignorance；be prepared to do 表示“愿意/准备好做”。

sentences.sentence: After the homework has been discussed, the teacher explains the topic of the lesson, slowly and with a lot of repetition and elaboration.
sentences.translation: 作业讨论完后，教师会缓慢地、通过大量重复和阐释来讲解本课主题。

structure.text: After the homework has been discussed
slowly and with a lot of repetition and elaboration

difficult_points: has been discussed 是现在完成时被动，表示讨论完成后才进入下一步。
with a lot of... 说明讲解所采用的方式。

sentences.sentence: Examples are demonstrated on the board; questions from the textbook are worked through first with the class, and then the class is set questions from the textbook to do individually.
sentences.translation: 例题在黑板上演示；教材中的问题先与全班一起逐步做完，随后再给全班布置教材问题供学生独立完成。

structure.text: Examples are demonstrated on the board
questions from the textbook are worked through first with the class
the class is set questions from the textbook to do individually

difficult_points: work through 表示一步一步完成或研究，使用被动语态。
be set questions 表示“被布置问题”；to do individually 修饰 questions。

sentences.sentence: Only rarely are supplementary worksheets distributed in a maths class.
sentences.translation: 数学课上很少发放补充练习纸。
difficult_points: Only rarely 位于句首时触发 are...distributed 的部分倒装。
are distributed 是被动语态，说明练习纸被发给学生。

sentences.sentence: The impression is that the logical nature of the textbooks and their comprehensive coverage of different types of examples, combined with the relative homogeneity of the class, renders worksheets unnecessary.
sentences.translation: 给人的印象是，教材的逻辑性及其对不同类型例子的全面覆盖，再加上班级成员相对同质，使练习纸变得没有必要。

structure.text: that the logical nature of the textbooks and their comprehensive coverage of different types of examples, combined with the relative homogeneity of the class, renders worksheets unnecessary

difficult_points: that 从句作表语，说明“给人的印象”是什么。
combined with... 是过去分词短语，修饰并列主语；render + 宾语 + 形容词表示“使……变得……”。

sentences.sentence: At this point, the teacher would circulate and make sure that all the pupils were coping well.
sentences.translation: 到了这一步，教师会在教室里走动，确认所有学生都能应付得很好。

structure.text: make sure that all the pupils were coping well

difficult_points: would 在这里表示教学流程中的惯常做法，不是单纯的将来。
make sure 后接 that 从句；cope well 表示“应付得好”。

sentences.sentence: It is remarkable that large, mixed-ability classes could be kept together for maths throughout all their compulsory schooling from 6 to 15.
sentences.translation: 令人惊讶的是，从6岁到15岁的整个义务教育期间，大型、能力混合的班级能够在数学课上始终保持在一起。

structure.text: that large, mixed-ability classes could be kept together for maths throughout all their compulsory schooling from 6 to 15

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，真正主语是后面的 that 从句。
could be kept together 是被动结构，表示班级能被维持在一起。

sentences.sentence: Teachers say that they give individual help at the end of a lesson or after school, setting extra work if necessary.
sentences.translation: 教师说，他们会在课末或放学后提供个别帮助，必要时布置额外作业。

structure.text: that they give individual help at the end of a lesson or after school

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明教师所说的内容。
setting... 表示伴随做法，if necessary 是省略条件结构。

sentences.sentence: In observed lessons, any strugglers would be assisted by the teacher or quietly seek help from their neighbour.
sentences.translation: 在被观察的课堂中，任何跟不上的学生都会得到教师帮助，或安静地向邻座同学求助。

structure.text: would be assisted by the teacher
quietly seek help from their neighbour

difficult_points: observed 是过去分词，修饰 lessons。
strugglers 指学习上跟不上的人；would 表示观察到的常见情形。

sentences.sentence: Carefully fostered class identity makes pupils keen to help each other - anyway, it is in their interests since the class progresses together.
sentences.translation: 被精心培养的班级认同感使学生乐于互相帮助——反正这也符合他们的利益，因为全班是一起进步的。

structure.text: pupils keen to help each other

difficult_points: Carefully fostered 是过去分词短语，修饰 class identity。
make + 宾语 + 形容词/不定式表示“使某人乐于做……”；it 指互助这件事。

sentences.sentence: This scarcely seems adequate help to enable slow learners to keep up.
sentences.translation: 这种帮助似乎几乎不足以让学习较慢的学生跟上进度。

structure.text: to enable slow learners to keep up

difficult_points: scarcely 表示“几乎不”，带有否定意味。
to enable... 修饰 help，说明这种帮助要达到的作用。

sentences.sentence: However, the Japanese attitude towards education runs along the lines of 'if you work hard enough, you can do almost anything'.
sentences.translation: 然而，日本人对教育的态度大致遵循这样的思路：“只要你足够努力，几乎什么都能做到。”

structure.text: if you work hard enough, you can do almost anything

difficult_points: run along the lines of 表示“大致遵循……的思路”。
引语中 if 引导条件从句，enough 后置修饰 hard。

sentences.sentence: Parents are kept closely informed of their children's progress and will play a part in helping their children to keep up with class, sending them to 'Juku' (private evening tuition) if extra help is needed and encouraging them to work harder.
sentences.translation: 家长会被密切告知孩子的进步情况，并会参与帮助孩子跟上班级：若需要额外帮助，就把他们送去“Juku”（私人晚间补习），同时鼓励他们更加努力。

structure.text: are kept closely informed of their children's progress
will play a part in helping their children to keep up with class
sending them to 'Juku' (private evening tuition) if extra help is needed

difficult_points: keep sb. informed of 表示“让某人持续了解……”，此处为被动。
sending 和 encouraging 是并列分词短语；if extra help is needed 是被动条件从句。

sentences.sentence: It seems to work, at least for 95 per cent of the school population.
sentences.translation: 这似乎奏效，至少对95%的学生群体来说如此。

structure.text: at least for 95 per cent of the school population

difficult_points: It 指前述的教育支持方式。
seem to do 表示“似乎会……”，at least 限定结论的范围。

sentences.sentence: So what are the major contributing factors in the success of maths teaching?
sentences.translation: 那么，数学教学成功的主要促成因素是什么？

structure.text: in the success of maths teaching

difficult_points: 这是特殊疑问句，what 作表语，主语是 the major contributing factors。
contributing 修饰 factors，表示“促成成功的”。

sentences.sentence: Clearly, attitudes are important.
sentences.translation: 显然，态度很重要。
difficult_points: Clearly 是句子副词，表达作者的判断。
attitudes 为复数主语，因此使用 are。

sentences.sentence: Education is valued greatly in Japanese culture; maths is recognised as an important compulsory subject throughout schooling; and the emphasis is on hard work coupled with a focus on accuracy.
sentences.translation: 教育在日本文化中受到高度重视；数学在整个学校教育中被视为重要必修课；重点则放在努力学习以及对准确性的重视上。

structure.text: Education is valued greatly in Japanese culture
maths is recognised as an important compulsory subject throughout schooling
the emphasis is on hard work coupled with a focus on accuracy

difficult_points: 三个分号分隔的分句并列列出文化与教学态度。
coupled with... 是过去分词短语，修饰 hard work，表示与对准确性的关注相结合。

sentences.sentence: Other relevant points relate to the supportive attitude of a class towards slower pupils, the lack of competition within a class, and the positive emphasis on learning for oneself and improving one's own standard.
sentences.translation: 其他相关因素包括班级对较慢学生的支持态度、班内缺乏竞争，以及积极强调自主学习和提高自身水平。

structure.text: the supportive attitude of a class towards slower pupils
the lack of competition within a class
the positive emphasis on learning for oneself and improving one's own standard

difficult_points: relate to 表示“涉及、与……有关”。
三个并列名词短语共同作 relate to 的宾语；on 后接并列动名词。

sentences.sentence: And the view of repetitively boring lessons and learning the facts by heart, which is sometimes quoted in relation to Japanese classes, may be unfair and unjustified.
sentences.translation: 而且，那种认为日本课堂是重复而乏味的课、只靠死记硬背事实的看法——这种看法有时被用来描述日本课堂——可能既不公平也没有根据。

structure.text: the view of repetitively boring lessons and learning the facts by heart
which is sometimes quoted in relation to Japanese classes

difficult_points: which 指前面的 view，而不是 lessons 或 facts。
learning the facts by heart 是动名词短语，by heart 表示“凭记忆、死记硬背”。

sentences.sentence: No poor maths lessons were observed.
sentences.translation: 没有观察到差的数学课。
difficult_points: No 位于名词短语前，直接表示完全否定。
were observed 是过去时被动，说明观察者没有见到此类课程。

sentences.sentence: They were mainly good and one or two were inspirational.
sentences.translation: 它们大多很好，其中一两节还很有启发性。
difficult_points: They 指前一句的 maths lessons。
one or two 指一两节课，后面用复数谓语 were。
